text: To report a lost or stolen debit card, call Meridian Retail Bank's 24/7 card services line immediately or freeze the card instantly in the mobile app. A replacement card is issued within 3-5 business days.
Meridian Retail Bank's standard savings account currently earns 3.2% annual interest, credited monthly. Rates are variable and reviewed quarterly by the bank's treasury desk.
To request a credit limit increase on a Meridian card, log in to the mobile app, go to Card Settings, and submit a request. Approval depends on your account history and is not instant.

When an account holder passes away, the next of kin or executor should bring a death certificate and proof of relationship to any Meridian branch to begin the account closure and estate transfer process.
Meridian Retail Bank ATMs allow a maximum cash withdrawal of $1,000 per day per debit card. Higher limits can be requested temporarily through customer service for travel or large purchases.
International wire transfers from a Meridian account incur a flat $25 fee plus any correspondent bank charges, and typically settle within 1-3 business days depending on the destination country.
Personal loan applications at Meridian Retail Bank require proof of income, a valid ID, and a minimum credit score of 650. Approved loans are disbursed within 2 business days of signing.

If you suspect fraudulent activity on your Meridian account, such as an unauthorised transaction or someone impersonating the bank to request personal details, report it immediately through the fraud hotline or the app's 'Report a Concern' feature.

Meridian's mobile banking app supports biometric login (fingerprint or face ID) as an alternative to a password. If login repeatedly fails, users should reset their password rather than repeatedly retrying the same credentials.
A Meridian mortgage pre-approval considers income, existing debt, credit history, and the property's appraised value. Pre-approval letters are typically valid for 90 days from issue.
